1.speaker: male
1.text: deja vu ang hian i hre ngai em?

1.speaker: male
1.text: Ka sawi hi i hrethiam em?

1.speaker: male
1.text: Engmah a ni lo. I va han tangkailo tak.

2.speaker: male
2.text: He game-ah hian diklo a awm tlat?

2.speaker: male
2.text: Hriatna hi... he khawvel hi a tak a ni lo...

2.speaker: male
2.text: I don't understand, I don't speak Korean.

2.speaker: male
2.text: Simulation-ah hian kan awm em ni ang ka ti?

2.speaker: male
2.text: Do you have a google translation?
